prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.0L TFSI EA113 (engine code: **CCTA**) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, ARP head studs) and a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger running 22 psi on E85, paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500** standalone ECU and **Injector Dynamics ID1050x** injectors for 350+ hp at the wheels.

Custom **02A 6-speed manual transmission** swap with a **Quaife ATB differential**, **South Bend Stage 3 Clutch**, and **PPG close-ratio gears (2.15:1 1st gear)** for rapid acceleration, mated to a **custom 4.11:1 R&P** for optimized gearing.

Full **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** with **Eibach ERS 800lb/in springs**, **polyurethane bushings (Powerflex Black Series)** for the front beam and rear trailing arms, and **custom 5x112 17-inch BBS RS-GT wheels** wrapped in **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (205/40/17)** for track-focused handling.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny VW Type 2 (T1) widebody kit** with carbon fiber fenders, custom aluminum side skirts, and a **custom 3-piece aluminum front bumper** with integrated **Hella Rallye 1300 driving lights** and a **custom aluminum grille** for a vintage-meets-modern aesthetic.

**Custom 21-window glass replacement** with **tinted UV-cut Safelite OEM+ glass** (retaining original chrome trim) and **LED halo headlights (Hella 7-inch, DOT-approved)** with **custom C-shaped DRLs** integrated into the lower bumper.

**Full custom interior** featuring **Recaro SRD Evo seats (retro-styled, FIA-approved)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede)**, and a **custom aluminum dashboard** housing **AEM X-Series gauges (boost, EGT, wideband AFR)** alongside a **retro-modern Alpine iLX-F511 head unit** with **Focal Utopia Be tweeters** and **JL Audio 10TW3 subwoofer** in a custom aluminum enclosure.
